content.text: All four files have been read. Now I'll apply the fixes.

data.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""); CONTENT=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'console\.log'; then echo 'Warning: console.log statements should be removed before committing' >&2; exit 2; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == "package.json" ]]; then echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then RESULT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "TypeScript errors found: $RESULT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && grep -q 'import \* from' "$FILE"; then echo 'Warning: Avoid wildcard imports for better tree-shaking' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ && "$FILE" != *".test."* && "$FILE" != *".spec."* ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" | sed -E 's/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$//'); for TEST_FILE in "$DIR/$BASENAME.test."* "$DIR/$BASENAME.spec."*; do if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running tests for $TEST_FILE..."; if command -v jest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx jest "$TEST_FILE" --passWithNoTests; elif command -v vitest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx vitest run "$TEST_FILE"; fi; break; fi; done; fi
callback

content.text: Now I need to apply the second part of fix 4 -- replacing `permissionGranted` with `pushEnabled` in the template.

input.old_string:
<Text style={styles.statusEmoji}>
            {permissionGranted ? '🔔' : '🔕'}
          </Text>
          <Text style={styles.statusText}>
            {permissionGranted
              ? 'Les notifications push sont activees.'
              : 'Les notifications push sont desactivees. Activez-les dans les parametres de votre telephone.'}
          </Text>
input.new_string:
<Text style={styles.statusEmoji}>
            {pushEnabled ? '🔔' : '🔕'}
          </Text>
          <Text style={styles.statusText}>
            {pushEnabled
              ? 'Les notifications push sont activees.'
              : 'Les notifications push sont desactivees. Activez-les dans les parametres de votre telephone.'}
          </Text>

content.content: The file C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\profile\notifications.tsx has been updated successfully.

content.text:
All four fixes have been applied. Here is a summary of what was changed in each file:

---

**1. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\scan.tsx`** -- Full file rewrite with three fixes:
- Replaced destructured `scanning` and `clearResult` from `useQRScanner` with the actual hook return names: `isProcessing`, `resetScan`, `flash`, and `toggleFlash`. Removed the local `useState` for `flashEnabled` since the hook manages flash state.
- Fixed `onBarcodeScanned` handler: CameraView passes a `BarcodeScanningResult` object, so the handler now extracts `result.data` before passing the string to `handleBarCodeScanned`. The `BarcodeScanningResult` type is now imported from `expo-camera`.
- Fixed `ScanResult` usage: instead of passing a single `result` prop, it now passes separate props (`success`, `data`, `error`, `onScanAgain`, `onDismiss`) matching the component's actual interface.
- Changed `Button` from children-based to `title` prop-based API.

**2. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\offers\[offerId].tsx`** -- OfferQRDisplay props fix:
- Changed `token` prop to `value`
- Changed `isUsed`/`isExpired` boolean props to a single `status` prop with values `'used' | 'expired' | 'active'`
- Added `usedAt` prop passing `offer.redeemed_at`

**3. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\offer\[token].tsx`** -- Same OfferQRDisplay props fix as file 2.

**4. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\profile\notifications.tsx`** -- PushContext property name fix:
- Changed `permissionGranted` to `pushEnabled` in the destructuring from `usePush()`
- Updated all three references in the JSX template to use `pushEnabled` instead of `permissionGranted`
